title: chrysanthemum armenum
intro: Chrysanthemum armenum, also known as Armenian chrysanthemum or field chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of the Caucasus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum armenum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the flowers in hot water or a solvent.
